Gusto.notes: Strong brand in SMB payroll; expanding accountant and partner ecosystems.

Intuit QuickBooks Payroll.notes: Ecosystem attach rates drive predictable growth; leverages QuickBooks distribution.

ADP RUN.notes: Scale and compliance reputation; extensive channel programs.

Paychex Flex.notes: Deep broker/accountant ties; strong presence in micro and small segments.

Square Payroll.stage: Business unit of public company (Block, Inc.)
Square Payroll.profitability: Strong at company level; payroll likely subsidized for ecosystem growth
Square Payroll.notes: Optimized for Square ecosystem; strong in micro-merchants and restaurants.

Rippling.notes: Suite strategy (IT + HR + Finance); modular pricing can raise TCO.

Justworks.profitability: Mixed; depends on plan mix and benefits costs
Justworks.notes: Benefits-led PEO differentiation; ASO/standalone payroll improving.

Deel.notes: Expanding from global/EOR into US SMB payroll; early feature maturity in US.
